name: gw-discord-event-bot
description: Bot Discord configurable pour organiser des events Guild Wars / Guild Wars 2.

scripts.db:shell: docker compose exec postgres psql -U gw_events -d gw_events
scripts.db:tables: docker compose exec postgres psql -U gw_events -d gw_events -c "\dt"
scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/bot.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check src/discord/render.js
